title: basella oleracea
intro: Basella oleracea, also known as Indian spinach or Malabar spinach, is a tropical vine plant that belongs to the Basellaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Basella oleracea include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the management of diabetes and hypertension. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
